channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Signing with Dodgers was really easy decision for 2-time Cy Young winner Blake Snell
item.description: Two-time Cy Young Award winner Blake Snell says it was a really easy decision to sign with the World Series champion Los Angeles Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: Beth Harris, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Little G: 12-year-old skateboarding prodigy aims for SLS and Olympic gold
item.description: Guerlain Girardin, also known as Little G, is a 12-year-old skateboarder who skates 7 days a week. He has already won the European championship and the California games in the U14 category.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: Nick Rimando elected to National Soccer Hall of Fame
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Former Real Salt Lake goalkeeper Nick Rimando has been elected to the National Soccer Hall of Fame. Rimando will be enshrined with the Class of 2025 on May 3, 2025 in Frisco, Texas.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Second-to-last college playoff rankings offer last chance to see how nervous teams should be
item.description: The next-to-last College Football Playoff rankings come out Tuesday night, serving up one last chance to see who would be in, who would be out, who will be mad and who should be very, very nervous this weekend.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Talks on a new NHL CBA are set to start early next year. Here's why there is optimism
item.description: The NHL's collective bargaining agreement does not expire until Sept. 15, 2026. That discussions are set to begin on a new deal in early 2025 is already one step ahead of where hockey has been in labor negotiations in the past.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tiger Woods has no firm answers on a deal with Saudis or his future as a player
item.description: Tiger Woods could not offer much of a timetable Tuesday on PGA Tour negotiations with the Saudi backers of LIV Golf or his own future as a player. Woods is the tournament host of the Hero World Challenge this week, and that's his only role at Albany Golf Club in the Bahamas.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ryggs Johnston goes from a tiny Montana town to Australian Open champion: Analysis
item.description: A pair of Americans delivered command performances halfway around the world during Thanksgiving week. One was Peter Uihlein, the former U.S. Amateur champion and two-time Walker Cup player, winning by five shots in Qatar on the Asian Tour.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Charles Barkley, Mark Cuban agree their presidential ticket would win White House
item.description: Charles Barkley and Mark Cuban both agreed that a ticket featuring the both of them would win the presidency handily. They made their claim last week.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Texans' DeMeco Ryans suggests Trevor Lawrence bares some blame for brutal hit, says Jags players overreacted
item.description: Houston Texans head coach DeMeco Ryans suggested Trevor Lawrence was partially to blame for the concussion he suffered following a huge hit from Azeez Al-Shaair.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Giddey gets a triple-double as the Bulls race past the Nets for a 128-102 victory
item.description: Josh Giddey had 20 points, 13 rebounds and 11 assists, helping the Chicago Bulls beat the Brooklyn Nets 128-102 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Timberwolves blow out Lakers 109-80 behind Randle, Gobert and tough defense
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — Julius Randle scored 18 points and Rudy Gobert had 17 points and 12 rebounds to lead the Minnesota Timberwolves past the Los Angeles Lakers 109-80 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Eli Manning fans flames of Tom Brady rivalry after legendary QB posts shirtless fishing pic
item.description: The rivalry between Eli Manning and Tom Brady continues to rage after the Giants legend commented on the Patriots great's fishing picture.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Caitlin Clark, Angel Reese open 2025 WNBA season against each other as schedule releases
item.description: The 2025 WNBA season schedule has been released. Caitlin Clark's Indiana Fever and Angel Reese's Chicago Sky begin their respective seasons against each other.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: USC QB Miller Moss enters transfer portal after losing starting job to Jayden Maiava
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Southern California quarterback Miller Moss is entering the transfer portal after losing the Trojans' starting job last month. Moss made his announcement on social media Monday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Philadelphia ready to go the distance with RockyFest week dedicated to 'Rocky' movies
item.description: Rocky Balboa fans are ready to go the distance to honor Philly’s favorite fictional fighter almost 50 years after the first movie launched the enduring series of an underdog boxer persevering despite the odds.
item.dc:creator: Dan Gelston, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Kansas holds off Auburn for No. 1 in AP Top 25 as SEC grabs 3 of top 4 spots; UConn slides to No. 25
item.description: Kansas held off Auburn for the No. 1 ranking in The Associated Press Top 25 men's college basketball poll on Monday as Southeastern Conference teams grabbed three of the top four spots and two-time reigning national champion UConn nearly fell out entirely after an 0-3 week at the Maui Invitational.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Texas safety Michael Taaffe honors Jake Ehlinger, 'feels sorry' for fan who made sign mocking death
item.description: Taaffe had strong, passionate comments regarding a sign held up by a fan in the crowd for ESPN's College Gameday, broadcasting from the Texas A&M campus the morning before the big game.
item.dc:creator: Billy Gates, NewsNation

item.title: Atkins reaches 2,000 yards as USF Bulls fall at Rice
item.description: South Florida (6-6; 4-4 American) fell to Rice (4-8; 3-5 American), 35-28, Saturday as the Bulls closed out the regular season in the program’s first-ever game at Rice Stadium in Houston.
item.dc:creator: USF Football, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Tampa Bay Rays respond to Pinellas commissioner's letter on stadium deal
item.description: The President of the Tampa Bay Rays has sent a response letter to the Pinellas County Board of County Commissioners following the letter to the baseball team last week.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Utes women upset #3 Notre Dame, 78-67
item.description: GEORGE TOWN, CAYMAN ISLANDS — The Utah women's basketball team picked up their highest ranked win outside of the Huntsman Center in school history by taking down No. 3 Notre Dame, 78-67, in the final game of the Cayman Island Classic.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ohio State, Michigan players involved in melee after Buckeyes loss, multiple people pepper sprayed
item.description: COLUMBUS, Ohio (WCMH) — Michigan players planted their team flag at midfield of Ohio Stadium on Saturday afternoon after a 13-10 win over No. 2 Ohio State, leading to a brawl between players from both teams with police attempting to separate the sides and pepper spray being used.
item.dc:creator: Orri Benatar, NewsNation

item.title: USU wins NIT season tip-off over North Texas, 61-57
item.description: ORLANDO (ABC4 Sports) - A career-best scoring performance from Mason Falslev helped lead Utah State men’s basketball (7-0, 0-0 MW) to a championship game title at the NIT Season Tip-Off Friday evening, as the Aggies defeated North Texas 61-57 at the ESPN Wide World of Sports Complex.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: NFL football on Thanksgiving
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—The Dallas Cowboys ended a six-game home losing streak with a 27-20 victory over the New York Giants on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: 49ers to likely play Bills in heavy snow, 'dangerously cold wind chills': NWS
item.description: (KRON) -- In last week's 38-10 blowout loss to the Green Bay Packers, the 49ers' loss had little to do with the weather at Lambeau Field, also known as "The Frozen Tundra." At kickoff, it was a calm 42 degrees and mostly cloudy in the typical chilly Midwest city.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: New York Jets hire 33rd team to assist in hiring process
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- An organizational shift is upon us for the New York Jets. Owner Woody Johnson has hired the 33rd team which was founded by former Jets GM Mike Tannenbaum in 2019, to help aid the Jets search.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: CU Buffs basketball upsets defending champion UConn at Maui Invitational
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — What a huge win for Tadd Boyle and the Colorado Buffaloes. A 14.5-point underdog against the two-time defending national champion #2 UConn Huskies at the Maui Invitational, CU erased an early 11-point deficit before going blow for blow in the second half.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Wembanyama scores 34 as Spurs beat Jazz, 128-115
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - 17 games into the NBA season, the Utah Jazz and San Antonio Spurs have already played each other four times, and the Jazz have to be glad they don't have to see Victor Wembanyama again this season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Blake Snell agrees to 5-year deal with Dodgers: reports
item.description: (KRON) -- After one year with the San Francisco Giants, star pitcher Blake Snell left for their biggest rival. Snell agreed to a five-year deal with the Los Angeles Dodgers on Wednesday, according to reports from ESPN, MLB.com and others. Snell is a two-time Cy Young award winner.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4
